Detailed help for list command shown with options: --project, --status. Includes description, examples, and config section. Exit code 0.
Detailed help for claim command shown with argument <task-id> and its description. Includes description, examples, and config section. Exit code 0.

ELF 64-bit LSB executable, x86-64, dynamically linked, interpreter /lib64/ld-linux-x86-64.so.2, for GNU/Linux 3.2.0

steps.expected: Binary runs without bun in PATH
steps.observed: Binary runs successfully with PATH restricted to /usr/bin:/bin:/usr/sbin:/sbin (no bun). ldd shows only standard system libs: libc, libpthread, libdl, libm.

summary: Tested 4 assertions: all passed. VAL-CLI-001: Help output comprehensive with all commands, options, examples. VAL-CLI-002: CLI auto-generates config with random agent UUID when missing, works seamlessly. VAL-CLI-008: All error cases produce clear messages and exit code 1. VAL-CLI-009: Binary is standalone ELF executable with no Bun dependency.
